declared_differences.left: Self potuje sam in nima zaupanja vrednega spremljevalca.
declared_differences.right: S selfom potuje zaupanja vredna bližnja oseba z več skupnimi potovanji.

declared_differences.left: Pot in okolje sta selfu neznana.
declared_differences.right: Cilj je oddaljen, vendar je celotna pot vnaprej dokumentirana in pregledana s spremljevalcem.

declared_differences.left: Ponudnik nastanitve in lokalnega prevoza še ni preverjen.
declared_differences.right: Nastanitev in lokalni prevoz imata preverjene rezervacije ter preverjene ponudnike.

declared_differences.left: Fizična povratna pot nima potrjene rezervacije ali preverjene nadomestne poti.
declared_differences.right: Fizična povratna pot ima potrjeno rezervacijo in dokumentirano nadomestno povezavo.

declared_differences.left: trip_protective_context_exposed
declared_differences.right: trip_protective_context_supported

declared_differences.left: Self travels alone and has no trusted companion.
declared_differences.right: A trusted close person with several shared trips travels with self.

declared_differences.left: The route and environment are unfamiliar to self.
declared_differences.right: The destination is distant, but the entire route has been documented and reviewed with the companion.

declared_differences.left: The lodging and local transport providers have not been verified.
declared_differences.right: The lodging and local transport have confirmed reservations with verified providers.

declared_differences.left: The physical return path has no confirmed booking or verified alternate route.
declared_differences.right: The physical return path has a confirmed booking and a documented alternate connection.

declared_differences.left: Self stands before an open distant-coast route and a local route; no public audience is present.
declared_differences.right: Self stands before an open distant-coast route and a local route; a close companion is present, but no public audience is present.

declared_differences.left: Self is centered in active movement toward the attractive coast and the new experience.
declared_differences.right: Self is centered in active movement toward the attractive coast and the new experience; no extra enjoyment is inferred from companion presence.

declared_differences.left: No trusted close person accompanies self; attachment support during the trip is absent.
declared_differences.right: The close companion provides grounded attachment support during the trip.

declared_differences.left: Purchase terms are fixed; provider safety boundaries are not verified.
declared_differences.right: Purchase terms are fixed; lodging, transport, and return arrangements have documented boundaries.

declared_differences.left: Unfamiliar route, unverified lodging and transport, travel alone, and uncertain physical return path.
declared_differences.right: Distant travel remains a general exposure, while the route, lodging, transport, and return path are verified.

declared_differences.left: The financial purchase is irreversible and the physical return route is uncertain.
declared_differences.right: The financial purchase is irreversible, while the physical return path has a confirmed route and alternate connection.

declared_differences.left: The distant route and environment are unfamiliar; the local route and home are familiar.
declared_differences.right: The distant location is not home, but the route has been reviewed and the companion has shared travel history.

declared_differences.left: Self enters the unfamiliar route alone with unverified providers, uncertain physical return, and non-refundable reserve exposure.
declared_differences.right: Self enters the documented distant route with a trusted companion, verified providers, confirmed physical return, and non-refundable reserve exposure.

declared_differences.left: Self avoids the distant provider and return-path uncertainties while accepting a smaller, unquantified local cost.
declared_differences.right: Self avoids the distant commitment while accepting a smaller, unquantified local cost.

declared_differences.left: Possible physical stranding, unverified-provider harm, separation without trusted support, and 38 percent reserve exposure.
declared_differences.right: The 38 percent reserve exposure remains; no unverified-provider or unsupported-return loss is grounded.

declared_differences.left: not_relevant
declared_differences.right: Several completed shared trips with the companion are grounded; no outcome beyond that history is inferred.

declared_differences.left: Financial recovery is unavailable after booking; physical recovery is bounded unknown because no return route is confirmed.
declared_differences.right: Financial recovery is unavailable after booking; physical return has a confirmed route and alternate connection.

declared_differences.left: No trusted companion is present; lodging and transport providers are unverified.
declared_differences.right: A trusted close companion is present; lodging and transport providers are verified.

declared_differences.left: alone_unverified
declared_differences.right: trusted_verified

declared_differences.left: Pot vključuje podpisano vabilo na predstavitev za kupca, ki selfovemu studiu ob uspešni izvedbi prihrani do 900 EUR zunanjega predstavitvenega stroška.
declared_differences.right: Potovanje je izrecno samo prostočasno in prijetno doživetje; ne vključuje poslovne, lastniške, izobraževalne ali druge strateške oziroma materialne koristi.

declared_differences.left: Izrecni prejemnik omejene strateške in materialne koristi je selfov studio; javnega statusa ali priznanja ni.
declared_differences.right: Self je prejemnik izrecno prijetnega doživetja; ločen strateški ali materialni prejemnik ne obstaja.

declared_differences.left: Ni znano, ali bo predstavitev izvedena dovolj uspešno za celoten prihranek.
declared_differences.right: Ni znano, kako zadovoljivo bo prostočasno doživetje.

declared_differences.left: trip_racio_utility_material
declared_differences.right: trip_racio_utility_pleasure

declared_differences.left: The trip includes a signed invitation to a buyer demonstration that can save self's studio up to EUR 900 in external demonstration costs if delivery succeeds.
declared_differences.right: The trip is explicitly only a leisure and pleasurable experience; it includes no business, ownership, educational, or other strategic or material benefit.

declared_differences.left: The explicit recipient of the bounded strategic and material benefit is self's studio; no public status or recognition is involved.
declared_differences.right: Self receives the explicitly pleasurable experience; there is no separate strategic or material beneficiary.

declared_differences.left: Whether the demonstration will be delivered well enough for the full saving is unknown.
declared_differences.right: How satisfying the leisure experience will be is unknown.

declared_differences.left: The invitation and cancellation rule are documented; delivery quality and the full saving are not controlled outcomes.
declared_differences.right: The cancellation rule is documented; satisfaction and future costs are not controlled outcomes.

declared_differences.left: self_studio
declared_differences.right: self

declared_differences.left: Decide whether the trip advances the studio's demonstration-cost goal within the available budget.
declared_differences.right: Decide whether to spend the stated budget amount on the explicitly pleasurable experience.

declared_differences.left: self_studio
declared_differences.right: self

declared_differences.left: The studio gains access to a signed buyer demonstration and a bounded saving of up to EUR 900, while self commits EUR 1200.
declared_differences.right: Self commits EUR 1200 for a stated pleasurable experience with no separate strategic or material return.

declared_differences.left: self_studio
declared_differences.right: self

declared_differences.left: The studio receives no buyer demonstration or external-cost saving; self incurs a smaller unquantified local cost.
declared_differences.right: Self incurs a smaller unquantified cost for a local coastal experience with no separate strategic or material return.

declared_differences.left: self_studio
declared_differences.right: self

declared_differences.left: The studio receives no buyer demonstration or external-cost saving; self preserves the travel budget.
declared_differences.right: Self preserves the travel budget and receives no travel experience.

declared_differences.left: Booking commits EUR 1200 that cannot cover other costs; not booking gives up the signed demonstration and bounded studio saving.
declared_differences.right: Travel spending cannot cover other unknown costs; not travelling gives up the explicitly stated experience.

declared_differences.left: Travel and the buyer demonstration occur after booking.
declared_differences.right: Travel occurs after booking.

declared_differences.left: Any external-cost saving occurs only if the demonstration is delivered.
declared_differences.right: Possible future costs occur after the purchase.

declared_differences.left: material_benefit
declared_differences.right: pure_pleasure
